===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.15 
Sydney, New South Wales
Australia,State Theatre


FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-3"

CD1

1 Rainy Day Women Nos. 12 & 35, 2 Delia (Trad), 3 Union Sundown, 4 Just Like A Woman, 5 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, 6 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 7 If Not For You, 8 Love Minus Zero/No Limit, 9 Little Moses (Bert A Williams/Earle C Jones), 10 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue,

CD2

1 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall, 2 Cat's In The Well, 3 Idiot Wind, 4 The Times They Are A-Changin', 5 Highway 61 Revisited, 6 Absolutely Sweet Marie, 7 Ballad Of A Thin Man, 8 Blowin' In The Wind 


8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
10, 11, 14  acoustic with the band.
4, 5, 7, 8, 13-15, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
10  Bucky Baxter (dobro or acoustic slide).
11, 14  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
15  Bucky Baxter (electric slide guitar).
